name: open-design
description: Open Design plugin for generating decks, prototypes, posters, and brand pages from Codex, with browser-visible previews served by the local od daemon.

interface.shortDescription: Generate decks, prototypes, and brand-true design artifacts from your agent
interface.longDescription: Workflow skills and MCP server configuration for routing design work to a local Open Design daemon: creating projects, running generation with 139 design skills and 150 DESIGN.md systems, previewing raw HTML artifacts in your agent's browser, verifying results visually, iterating, and exporting to PDF/PPTX/image. Local-first: files, generation, and previews stay on your machine.
defaultPrompt: Make a launch deck in Open Design and show me the preview
Turn this folder into a polished landing page with Open Design
Extract a brand from a URL and redesign my page to match it
Export my Open Design project as PPTX
